parsed.availability_comment: Available for immediate selection as of March 23, 2026; minor discount only for normal overseas-management uncertainty.
parsed.availability_note: No current injury/suspension report found; named in CSK 2026 squad and in match squad for opening phase.
parsed.followup_reason: No adverse availability signal found; only remaining uncertainty is final match-to-match combination choice rather than player availability.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Pressure remains because CSK have multiple overseas bowling options, yet Brevis appears favored as a retained middle-order hitter.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes with CSK's overseas bowlers/all-rounders for one of four slots, but batting role looks stronger than baseline suggested.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Retained overseas batter and widely projected in CSK first-choice middle order; still not formally confirmed in official XI yet.
